title: Mismatch in input data field name for upload file node
symptom: The upload file node throws an error due to incorrect input data field name. The expected field name is not matching the provided name.
applies_when: Binary data from a previous node
not_this_if: Input data field name is correct
No binary data is being used
root_cause: The upload file node requires the input data field name to match the binary data field name from the previous node. If the names do not match, the node cannot process the data correctly, leading to an error.
fix_steps: Open the upload file node settings
Change the Input data field name from 'data' to 'Data_Pasien'
agent_instruction: Update the input data field name in the upload file node to match the binary data field name.
